sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ze-etna le nasep nate bei ciang,
A hoih tuipi gei-ah muangtak om ding;
Ka it mahmah Topa
kiang nai om ding,
Tanglai pek pan minthanna kei a’ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw kei a’
ding tua minthanna,
Tua minthanna, tua minthanna;
Hong hehpih na, A mai ka en dingta,
Tua
minthanna in keima a’ ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A bei ngei lo hehpihna hong piak ciang,
Vantung
khua ah omna khat ka nei ding;
Topa maitang tua mun ka mu den ding,
Tanglai pek pan minthanna kei
a’ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sawtpi a muh nop lawm te na om ding,
Tua mun-ah lungdamna guntui luang
ding;
Gumpa mai-ah nuih mai bek om ka thei,
Tanglai pek pan minthanna kei a’ding.
